2603.19516.title: Gastric-X: A Multimodal Multi-Phase Benchmark Dataset for Advancing Vision-Language Models in Gastric Cancer Analysis
2603.19516.paper_summary: Recent vision-language models (VLMs) have shown strong generalization and multimodal reasoning abilities in natural domains. However, their application to medical diagnosis remains limited by the lack of comprehensive and structured datasets that capture real clinical workflows. To advance the development of VLMs for clinical applications, particularly in gastric cancer, we introduce Gastric-X, a large-scale multimodal benchmark for gastric cancer analysis providing 1.7K cases. Each case in Gastric-X includes paired resting and dynamic CT scans, endoscopic image, a set of structured biochemical indicators, expert-authored diagnostic notes, and bounding box annotations of tumor regions, reflecting realistic clinical conditions. We systematically examine the capability of recent VLMs on five core tasks: Visual Question Answering (VQA), report generation, cross-modal retrieval, disease classification, and lesion localization. These tasks simulate critical stages of clinical workflow, from visual understanding and reasoning to multimodal decision support. Through this evaluation, we aim not only to assess model performance but also to probe the nature of VLM understanding: Can current VLMs meaningfully correlate biochemical signals with spatial tumor features and textual reports? We envision Gastric-X as a step toward aligning machine intelligence with the cognitive and evidential reasoning processes of physicians, and as a resource to inspire the development of next-generation medical VLMs.
2603.19516.paper_summary_zh: 近期的視覺-語言模型（VLMs）在自然領域中展現了強大的泛化能力和多模態推理能力。<lb/>然而，它們在醫療診斷中的應用仍然受到限制，因為缺乏能夠捕捉真實臨床工作流程的綜合且結構化的數據集。<lb/>為了推進VLMs在臨床應用，特別是在胃癌方面的發展，我們介紹了Gastric-X，一個大規模的多模態基準，用於胃癌分析，提供了1.7K個病例。<lb/>Gastric-X中的每個病例包括配對的靜態和動態CT掃描、內窺鏡圖像、一組結構化的生化指標、專家撰寫的診斷筆記，以及腫瘤區域的邊界框註釋，反映了現實的臨床條件。<lb/>我們系統性地檢查了近期VLMs在五個核心任務上的能力：視覺問題回答（VQA）、報告生成、跨模態檢索、疾病分類和病變定位。<lb/>這些任務模擬了臨床工作流程的關鍵階段，從視覺理解和推理到多模態決策支持。<lb/>通過這次評估，我們的目標不僅是評估模型性能，還是探討VLM理解的本質：當前的VLMs能否有意義地將生化信號與空間腫瘤特徵和文本報告相關聯？<lb/>我們設想Gastric-X作為將機器智能與醫生的認知和證據推理過程對齊的一步，並作為激發下一代醫療VLMs發展的資源。
2603.19516.author: Sheng Lu et.al.
2603.19516.authors: Sheng Lu, Hao Chen, Rui Yin, Juyan Ba, Yu Zhang, Yuanzhe Li
